_README: Tracking state for the brand sweep on the brand-discovery branch. Updated as each brand is processed.

completed.notes: POST per country. Required new post_per_country engine strategy.

blocked.reason: ASP.NET WebForms postback. Store data is rendered into HTML by Storelocator.aspx after __doPostBack on country/city dropdowns. No JSON XHR feed (the GetViewportInfo XHRs are Google Maps tile metadata, not store data). Would require __VIEWSTATE/__EVENTVALIDATION management + per-country + per-city HTML parsing.
blocked.fix_estimate: half-day of engine work; defer until 2+ similar brands surface
